params.title: RP LLM Configuration
params.description: Configure your Roleplay LLM (KoboldCPP, Ollama, etc.)

params.title: Logic LLM Configuration
params.description: Configure the smaller Logic LLM (for state extraction)

form.label: Logic Model Name
form.description: A smaller, fast model like llama3, phi3, gemma2

params.title: SillyTavern Setup
params.description:
In SillyTavern, go to:
1. Connect → OpenAI API
2. Set Proxy URL to: http://localhost:8001
3. API Key: any value
4. Model: langgraph-agent

Click OK when done.

params.title: Installation Complete!
params.description:
LangGraph ST Agent is installed and configured.

Go back to the dashboard and click 'Run' to start the server.
Then point SillyTavern to http://localhost:8001
